_comment: Merge into LLaMA-Factory/data/dataset_info.json and put the .jsonl under data/. Requires the fork branch feat/per-turn-loss-mask (per-turn `loss`). Train `dataset: innovation_sft` (optionally concatenate the wave-2 batches innovation_wave2_sft.jsonl / innovation_v4_sft.jsonl after gunzip), template qwen3 (or qwen3_5), mask_history=false. The per-turn `loss` flags do the think-folding. NOTE: the HF-scraped capability-maintenance set (formerly `innovation_maintain` / maintain_sft.jsonl, collected from public HF sources) was DROPPED 2026-07 — training is innovation-only now.
